seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Start with lowest reasoning setting that works; escalate to Medium/High for planning or multi-step tasks; Max for single hard problems, Ultra for parallel subagents. Levels don't map 1:1 from prior versions.
Proactive agent memory: connect sources, specify interests, agent proactively builds and maintains wiki for codebases or general tasks (email/web); supports code brain and personal brain modes.
Rapid shifts in best models per use-case: Fable for master agent, Grok variants for sub-agents/real-time, specific models for OCR/design/images/video; massive intelligence leap in open-source too.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: On-chain access to GPT-5.6 family via pay-per-use and OpenAI-compatible endpoints for agents.
near_misses.reason: Mentions agents and models but lacks deep technical innovation or benchmarks.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Agents handle routing, allocation, and rebalancing across venues for APY optimization.
